section.class: s_title pt40 o_colored_level pb0
s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 預設箭頭

section.class: s_image_gallery o_slideshow s_image_gallery_show_indicators s_image_gallery_indicators_rounded o_colored_level pt56
s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 方框箭頭 — s_image_gallery_indicators_arrows_boxed

section.class: s_image_gallery o_slideshow s_image_gallery_show_indicators s_image_gallery_indicators_rounded pt24 o_colored_level s_image_gallery_indicators_arrows_boxed
s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 圓形箭頭 — s_image_gallery_indicators_arrows_rounded

section.class: s_image_gallery o_slideshow s_image_gallery_show_indicators s_image_gallery_indicators_rounded pt24 o_colored_level s_image_gallery_indicators_arrows_rounded
s_image_gallery o_spc-small o_masonry pt24 pb24 o_colored_level
s_title pt64 pb0 o_colored_level

div.p: 首頁 Hero 輪播幾乎都用 s_carousel_wrapper；箭頭形狀由 div.s_carousel 上的 class 決定，共四種變體

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 正方形框箭頭（預設）— s_carousel_default

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active

div.p: Use this snippet to presents your content in a slideshow-like format. Don't write about products or services here, write about solutions.

div.class: carousel-item pt96 pb96 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level
carousel-content col-lg-8 offset-lg-2 bg-black-50 text-center pt48 pb40 o_colored_level
div.p:
Storytelling is powerful.
It draws readers in and engages them.

div.class: carousel-item pt128 pb128 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

h4.font: Good writing is simple, but not simplistic.

div.p: Good copy starts with understanding how your product or service helps your customers. Simple words communicate better than big words and pompous language.

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 高窄長條箭頭 — s_carousel_bordered（height × 1.6、width × 0.8、no border-radius）

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center active

div.p: Use this snippet to presents your content in a slideshow-like format. Don't write about products or services here, write about solutions.

div.class: carousel-item pt96 pb96 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center
carousel-content col-lg-8 offset-lg-2 bg-black-50 text-center pt48 pb40 o_colored_level
div.p:
Storytelling is powerful.
It draws readers in and engages them.

div.class: carousel-item pt128 pb128 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center

h4.font: Good writing is simple, but not simplistic.

div.p: Good copy starts with understanding how your product or service helps your customers. Simple words communicate better than big words and pompous language.

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 箱形箭頭 — s_carousel_boxed（Odoo 內建，無自訂 SCSS 覆寫）

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center active

div.p: Use this snippet to presents your content in a slideshow-like format. Don't write about products or services here, write about solutions.

div.class: carousel-item pt96 pb96 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center
carousel-content col-lg-8 offset-lg-2 bg-black-50 text-center pt48 pb40 o_colored_level
div.p:
Storytelling is powerful.
It draws readers in and engages them.

div.class: carousel-item pt128 pb128 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center

h4.font: Good writing is simple, but not simplistic.

div.p: Good copy starts with understanding how your product or service helps your customers. Simple words communicate better than big words and pompous language.

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt40

div.p: 圓形箭頭 — s_carousel_rounded（border-radius: 50%）

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center active

div.p: Use this snippet to presents your content in a slideshow-like format. Don't write about products or services here, write about solutions.

div.class: carousel-item pt96 pb96 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center
carousel-content col-lg-8 offset-lg-2 bg-black-50 text-center pt48 pb40 o_colored_level
div.p:
Storytelling is powerful.
It draws readers in and engages them.

div.class: carousel-item pt128 pb128 o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center

h4.font: Good writing is simple, but not simplistic.

div.p: Good copy starts with understanding how your product or service helps your customers. Simple words communicate better than big words and pompous language.

section.class: s_title pt64 pb0 o_colored_level

div.p: 直接在 section.s_carousel_wrapper 上疊加 s_custom_arrow* 即可控制箭頭位置

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowTop

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowBottom

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowLeft

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowRight

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowRight arrowTop

div.class: s_carousel s_carousel_default s_custom_arrowRight s_custom_arrowTop carousel slide
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowNoLine

div.class: carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowNoSeparate arrowTop

div.class: s_carousel s_carousel_default s_custom_arrowNoSeparate s_custom_arrowTop carousel slide
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level

section.class: s_text_block o_colored_level o_cc o_cc4 pb8 pt56

div.p: arrowL arrowTop

div.class: s_carousel s_carousel_default s_custom_arrowL s_custom_arrowTop carousel slide
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level active
carousel-item pt152 pb152 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_colored_level
